entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS LIKELY THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CALM WINDS, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AROUND 5 MPH THIS AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CALM WINDS
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HUMID WITH HIGHS AROUND 90
WEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
WEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 90
LOWS AROUND 70

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
